message:
feat(ftui-style): add SharedResolvedTheme with ArcSwap-backed concurrent access (bd-3l9qr.2)

Introduce SharedResolvedTheme in theme.rs — an ArcSwap-backed wrapper
around ResolvedTheme that enables lock-free concurrent reads with
atomic swaps for theme updates. This parallels SharedCapabilities in
ftui-core and supports the multi-writer inline rendering architecture
where multiple TerminalWriter instances share a single resolved theme
without mutex contention.

Methods: new(), load() (returns current Arc snapshot), store() (atomic
replacement).

Add arc-swap 1.8.2 dependency and ftui-core dev-dependency to
Cargo.toml.

Includes 3 unit tests verifying:
- load returns initial value after construction
- store replaces the held value atomically
- concurrent read/write safety under thread contention

Add e2e_shared_store_concurrent.rs exercising concurrent shared store
access patterns.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -10,6 +10,7 @@ documentation = "https://docs.rs/ftui-style"
 readme = "../../README.md"
 
 [dependencies]
+arc-swap = "1.8.2"
 ftui-render = { path = "../ftui-render", version = "0.1.1" }
 tracing = "0.1.41"
 serde = { version = "1.0.227", features = ["derive"], optional = true }
@@ -18,6 +19,7 @@ serde = { version = "1.0.227", features = ["derive"], optional = true }
 serde = ["dep:serde"]
 
 [dev-dependencies]
+ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core", version = "0.1.1" }
 tracing-test = "0.2.5"
 proptest = "1.7.0"
 serde_json = "1.0.149"
